prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（含物理类）最低位次分别为约7262名→10085名→11556名→11329名→7500名。2021至2023年位次持续后移，2024年略有回升，2025年因内蒙古首次实施新高考（物理类/历史类）选科模式调整，位次大幅前移约3829名，2025年基准位次约7500名；2021–2023年理科计划均为68人，2024年增至69人，2025年物理类计划66人；2026年物理类计划66人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招信号，供需弹性中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（保定）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第84位，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属中上水平理工类院校；2026年声誉数据中该校未被重点提及，整体舆情中性；抖音学校热度总排名未进入前106名，短视频曝光量一般，未出现明显正面或负面舆情事件；电气工程学科评估A（全国前列），动力工程及工程热物理A-；电气工程及其自动化、能源动力类等王牌专业对考生吸引力强，是该校核心报考驱动力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化2024年专业热度为高热推荐，能源动力类为推荐（66.43），电子信息/通信为高热推荐（76.86），相关工科专业持续升温；内蒙古2026年高考总考生约15.4万人，按历史比例估算物理类约11.1万人，较2025年物理类8.37万人增长约32%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；该校位于河北省保定市，与内蒙古相邻，地域接受度高；2025年物理类在内蒙古招生66人，属该校在华北地区的重要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移后的基准、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生显著增加约32%以及电气等王牌专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧，位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约7350名，区间6850–7850名。

- 自动化。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6850–7850名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报区间，一档专业（电气、计算机、自动化）作为冲刺目标，三档专业作为稳妥保底。电气工程及其自动化是华北电力大学王牌中的王牌，位次在区间上限附近可重点冲刺；能源动力类、电子信息类兼具学科实力与行业热度，性价比高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 7262 → 10085 → 11556 → 11329 → 7500. Rankings continued to decline from 2021 to 2023, slightly recovered in 2024, and due to Inner Mongolia's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (physics/history category) subject selection mode adjustment in 2025, rankings significantly advanced by about 3829 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 7500 in 2025; science enrollment plans were 68 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 69 in 2024, and the physics category plan was 66 in 2025; the physics category plan for 2026 is 66, unchanged from 2025, with no signals of expansion or contraction, and supply-demand elasticity is neutral.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 84th, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; in 2026 reputation data, the school was not prominently mentioned, with overall public opinion neutral; the school's Douyin popularity total ranking did not enter the top 106, with general short video exposure, and no obvious positive or negative public opinion events; electrical engineering discipline evaluation is A (top in the country), power engineering and engineering thermophysics is A-; electrical engineering and its automation, energy and power, and other flagship majors have strong appeal to candidates, serving as the core driving force for applications to this school.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, electrical engineering and its automation had high heat recommendation, energy and power class was recommended (66.43), electronics/communication was high heat recommendation (76.86), and related engineering majors continue to heat up; in 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, with an estimated physics category of about 111,000 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 32% compared to the 2025 physics category of 83,700, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; the school is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, adjacent to Inner Mongolia, with high regional acceptance; in 2025, the physics category enrolled 66 students in Inner Mongolia, making it an important source of students for the school in North China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline after the significant ranking advance in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the substantial increase of about 32% in local physics category candidates, and the continued high heat of flagship majors like electrical engineering, competition in 2026 is expected to further intensify compared to 2025, with rankings slightly advancing. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7350, with a range of 6850–7850.

Electrical Engineering and Its Automation is the flagship of North China Electric Power University; candidates near the upper limit of the ranking range can focus on sprinting; Energy and Power Class, Electronic Information Class combine academic strength and industry popularity, offering high cost-performance.
